recovery_context.reason: Stream disconnected before completion during PB-035 validation.

source_evidence.pb034_summary: PB-034 proved governed branch hygiene allowed only governance/ and dependabot/ while PB release tooling generated usbay/ branches.

governance_assessment.risk: Allows an additional branch namespace into remote branch deletion governance. This would remediate current release branches but widens branch hygiene authority beyond the original governance/dependabot scope.

option_comparison.description: Change PB release branch generation from usbay/* to governance/*.

governance_assessment.risk: Requires release metadata consumers to use the governed branch prefix, but avoids adding a new deletion-eligible namespace.

selected_remediation.reason: Option B resolves the drift without expanding ALLOWED_BRANCH_PREFIXES. This preserves least privilege and keeps branch deletion governance scoped to the existing governance branch namespace.
selected_remediation.runtime_policy_change: PB release metadata now generates governance/<pb_slug> branches.

rejected_alternative.reason_not_selected: This would widen the branch deletion allow-list to another namespace. PB-035 only needs PB release branches to align with existing branch hygiene policy, so widening the allow-list is unnecessary and weaker under least privilege.

alignment_with_prior_evidence.summary: PB-035 does not alter the proven refusal writer or terminal-state correction path. It aligns PB branch generation with the existing governed branch namespace so valid PB release branches no longer create branch_pattern_not_allowed.

governance_evaluation.migration_impact: Existing open usbay/* branches may still fail branch hygiene. New PB release branches generated by USBAY tooling use governance/*.

valid_pb_release_branches_pass_branch_hy.expected: governance/governance-release-automation deletes successfully after merge evidence is verified

no_broad_wildcard_introduced.evidence: ALLOWED_BRANCH_PREFIXES remains unchanged as governance/ and dependabot/.

generated_pr_metadata.command: python3 scripts/usbay_pb_metadata_authority.py --pb-number 35 --pb-slug branch-policy-alignment --pb-title "Branch Policy Alignment" --decision VERIFIED --status "READY FOR REVIEW"

conflict_marker_scan.command: conflict marker scan across PB-035 changed files

final_answer.root_cause_summary: PB release tooling generated usbay/* branches while governed branch hygiene allowed only governance/* and dependabot/*, causing valid PB release branches to hit branch_pattern_not_allowed.
final_answer.selected_remediation: Option B: generate governance/* PB release branches.
final_answer.rejected_alternative_summary: Option A was rejected because adding usbay/ to ALLOWED_BRANCH_PREFIXES would unnecessarily widen the branch deletion policy.
final_answer.post_merge_refusal_due_to_branch_pattern: Resolved for generated PB release branches by aligning generation to governance/*.
